themeWords.meaning: to speak by divine inspiration; to prophesy
a lyre or harp, a stringed instrument

sentenceTheme: David organizes the sons of Asaph, Heman, and Jeduthun to prophesy with instruments and assigns their service by lots.

verses.text: Moreover David and the captains of the host separated to the service of the sons of Asaph, and of Heman, and of Jeduthun, who should prophesy with harps, with psalteries, and with cymbals: and the number of the workmen according to their service was:

highlightedWords.meaning: to speak by divine inspiration; to prophesy
psaltery, lyre; a stringed instrument

verses.text: Of the sons of Asaph; Zaccur, and Joseph, and Nethaniah, and Asarelah, the sons of Asaph under the hands of Asaph, which prophesied according to the order of the king.

highlightedWords.meaning: Asaph; a Levite, leader of temple singers
uttered prophecy; spoke by divine inspiration

verses.text: Of Jeduthun: the sons of Jeduthun; Gedaliah, and Zeri, and Jeshaiah, Hashabiah, and Mattithiah, and Shimei, six, under the hands of their father Jeduthun, who prophesied with a harp, to give thanks and to praise the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jeduthun; a Levitical musician and choir leader
a lyre or harp, a stringed instrument

verses.text: Of Heman: the sons of Heman; Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel, and Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, and Romamti-ezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir, and Mahazioth:

highlightedWords.meaning: Heman; a Levitical musician and the king’s seer
son; descendant; member of a group

verses.text: All these were the sons of Heman the king's seer in the words of God, to lift up the horn. And God gave to Heman fourteen sons and three daughters.

highlightedWords.meaning: seer; one who receives and reports divine revelations
horn; symbol of strength or exaltation

verses.text: All these were under the hands of their father for song in the house of the LORD, with cymbals, psalteries, and harps, for the service of the house of God, according to the king's order to Asaph, Jeduthun, and Heman.

highlightedWords.meaning: house; temple; household
cymbals; percussion instruments

verses.text: So the number of them, with their brethren that were instructed in the songs of the LORD, even all that were cunning, was two hundred fourscore and eight.

highlightedWords.meaning: song; singing; musical piece
intelligent; skillful; understanding

verses.text: And they cast lots, ward against ward, as well the small as the great, the teacher as the scholar.

highlightedWords.meaning: lot; allotment; decision by casting lots
small; young; insignificant

verses.text: Now the first lot came forth for Asaph to Joseph: the second to Gedaliah, who with his brethren and sons were twelve.

highlightedWords.meaning: lot; allotment; decision by casting lots
brother; kinsman; relative; fellow

verses.text: The third to Zaccur, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

highlightedWords.meaning: lot; allotment; decision by casting lots
brother; kinsman; relative; fellow

verses.text: The fourth to Izri, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

highlightedWords.meaning: lot; allotment; decision by casting lots
brother; kinsman; relative; fellow

brother; kinsman; relative; fellow
